messages.content: Give all subject, relation, and object triplets from the sentence, ‘View from a few feet away of the silhouette of a person standing on a surfboard riding on a white wave in dark blue and green water, with blue and white sky behind.’.

Subject: View
Relation: of
Object: silhouette of a person standing on a surfboard riding on a white wave in dark blue and green water, with blue and white sky behind
